{
  "claims": [
    "There is a record number of women serving in State Legislatures across the nation.",
    "Approximately one third of all state legislators are women.",
    "In California, 50 women make up 42% of state lawmakers, which is a record.",
    "The Seneca Falls Women’s Rights Convention was the first of its kind in the United States to fight for the social, civil and religious rights of women.",
    "The convention drafted the Declaration of Sentiments, which called for women's equality in politics, family, education, employment, and religion.",
    "The ninth of the 11 resolutions from the convention called directly for women to secure their right to vote.",
    "The resolution for women's right to vote became the cornerstone for the women’s suffrage movement for the next 72 years."
  ]
